instructions: Fetch the T-number from .todo/config.json before adding tasks. Assign a stable T-number to each task and keep it unchanged when moving between files. Keep one task per bullet, write descriptions as outcome-focused statements, and group tasks by canonical categories.
suggestions: Keep TODO-next focused on important developer and end-user work.
Use shared config under data-config/frontend_shared.json and data-config/server.json for the date/alias rule source.
Write task bullets as stable present-action statements, not retrospectives.
Avoid task wording that begins with 'now', 'now also', 'now removed', 'now always', or similar changelog-style phrasing.
Group done tasks under categories from the categories list. Do not create ad-hoc category headers.
Add the short commit hash after each done task entry when the commit is known: `- T-NNN. Task description (abc1234)`.
